overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist poling a wooden boat through a sunlit canal in a historic Middle Eastern city. The character navigates under a wooden covered bridge and past other boats while surrounded by mud-brick buildings, palm trees, and stone retaining walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canal with mud-brick buildings and palm trees

agents.ego_description: standing on the wooden boat poling forward through the sunlit canal with a long wooden pole

entered.detail: tan-colored mud brick buildings with small windows and wooden balconies along the left bank
weathered mud brick structures with wooden latticework on the right bank
tall date palm trees visible beyond the bridge ahead
rustic wooden bridge with roof covering the canal passage ahead
wooden docking platform with mooring posts on the left bank

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit canal flanked by mud-brick buildings and palm trees. The character poles a wooden boat forward toward a covered wooden bridge in the distance, with wooden docks visible along the banks.

events.description: boat enters the dark interior of the covered wooden bridge
exiting the covered bridge back into bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: poling the boat through the dimly lit interior of the covered bridge

entered.detail: wooden plank roof with support beams creating shade overhead
thick wooden support beams and posts on the left side
thick wooden support beams and posts on the right side

segments.scene_description: The boat enters a dark covered wooden bridge, blocking the sky and surrounding buildings. Wooden beams and supports line the canal as the character poles through the shaded passage, emerging back into sunlight at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal with stone walls and wooden cargo crane

events.description: passing under a wooden cargo crane with suspended platform

agents.ego_description: continuing to pole the boat past a wooden cargo crane extending over the water

entered.detail: tall stone retaining wall lining the left side of the canal
wooden cargo crane with rope and suspended platform extending over the canal

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the canal opens up with high stone walls on the left and mud-brick buildings on the right. The character poles past a wooden cargo crane with a suspended platform, with palm trees visible along the banks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walled canal section with moored boats

events.description: passing a small moored boat on the left bank

agents.ego_description: poling through the narrower walled section of the canal past moored vessels

notable_agents.action: figure standing on a small moored boat near the left bank

entered.detail: small wooden boat moored along the left stone wall
wooden docking platform extending from the right bank

segments.scene_description: The canal narrows between high stone walls on the left and buildings on the right. The character poles past a small moored boat with a person standing on it, continuing through the confined waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal widening near docked cargo boats

events.description: approaching a large moored cargo boat with a person working on the deck

agents.ego_description: poling past a large moored boat where an NPC is working on the deck

notable_agents.action: person working on the deck of a large moored cargo boat, handling a pole or net

entered.detail: large wooden cargo boat moored on the right bank with a person working on deck

segments.scene_description: The canal widens as the character approaches a large moored cargo boat on the right, where an NPC is working on the deck. The boat is poled past the vessel and wooden docks, with mud-brick buildings lining both banks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit canal that transitions from open waterways into a shaded passage before expanding back into a bustling urban harbor. It begins with the character poling a wooden boat past mud-brick buildings and palm trees toward a distant covered wooden bridge. As the boat enters the bridge, the bright sky is replaced by a dark, shaded corridor of wooden beams and supports before the camera emerges back into the sunlight. The scene then opens up to reveal high stone walls and a wooden cargo crane, narrowing briefly as the boat glides past a small moored vessel and its occupant. Finally, the waterway widens again, passing a large cargo boat with a working crew and wooden docks lined with mud-brick architecture.
